title: Mouthwatering Gooey Saudi Arabian Tagliatelle Pasta
description: A rich and indulgent vegetarian dish featuring tagliatelle pasta, fermented jang, and herbal flavors, cooked to perfection in a kadhai vessel, inspired by the bold flavors of Saudi Arabian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large kadhai vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dried thyme and oregano, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the ferment-jang and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Add the tagliatelle pasta and cook until al dente, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in the grated mozzarella cheese until melted and gooey.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
